scenes.description: Extreme close-up of a running shoe hitting wet pavement at dawn, sweat drops and water splash in slow motion
Dynamic tracking shot of a male runner's profile, determination on his face, city lights blurring behind
Female basketball player executing a powerful slam dunk, Nike shoes visible, arena lights exploding
Multiple athlete silhouettes leaping upward against golden sunset, Nike swoosh prominent in composition
Black screen, crisp white NIKE logo and Just Do It slogan with subtle glow effect
